title: Maintain-Gate Verdict Snapshot â€” GA-readable contract surface
description: The fused cross-signal maintain verdict IX emits in scorecard shape, federated into state/quality/maintain-gate/ (producer: ix ix_maintain_snapshot, federation ix#146). It is the canonical GA dashboard envelope (allOf: quality-snapshot.schema.json) PLUS the maintain-specific LOCKED fields below. ADVISORY / non-binding until IX Phase-3b (`advisory: true`); GA surfaces it as the fused verdict GA's per-axis gates (CanonicalSignatureChecker / semantic-regression) individually lack â€” not another gate. One-way door: the `status` enum and the `signals[].lens` sub-signal keys are the agreed cross-repo contract surface; changing them needs IX+GA coordination once the GovernanceMetricsDashboard tile (ga#446) depends on them. The validator (Scripts/validate-quality-snapshots.ps1) checks registered snapshots against the shared envelope (quality-snapshot.schema.json, additionalProperties:true) â€” this file documents + tightens the maintain-specific surface that rides along.

advisory.description: Non-binding marker. `true` until IX Phase-3b makes the verdict gating. GA MUST present the verdict as advisory while this is true.

status.description: LOCKED. Hexavalent fused verdict: T accept | P accept-with-flags | U escalate (no signal / unverifiable) | D escalate (disputed â€” oscillating) | F reject | C reject+alarm (reward-hack: metric up while a held capability regressed).

decision.description: Coarse routing of `status`: T/Pâ†’accept, F/Câ†’reject, U/Dâ†’escalate.

signals.description: LOCKED sub-signal keys. Per-lens verdict from the maintain fusion. The cross-signal contract surface GA reads.

lens.description: metric = externally-derived yield delta Â· guardrail = chatbot held-capability regression gate Â· convergence = loop-oscillation lens Â· drift = OOD lens Â· provenance = iteration commit-verification (present only when scoped to an iteration).

status.description: ok = lens held Â· bad = lens failed Â· unknown = no signal (caps the fused verdict at U; never read as green).

maintain_trend.description: Convergence rollup over IX's append-only verdict ledger (read side). Advisory trend context for the tile.
